scripts.prisma:copy: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); const src = 'node_modules/@prisma/client'; const dst = 'frontend/node_modules/@prisma/client'; if (fs.existsSync(src)) { fs.rmSync(dst, { recursive: true, force: true }); fs.cpSync(src, dst, { recursive: true }); console.log('Prisma client copied to frontend'); }"
